_meta.title: Full Globe Fixed — PCM_rel Corrected, ILP Depth 4
_meta.author: Kevin Monette
_meta.finding: The 6/12 split is a lab-frame artifact: PCM_lab = -0.5*cos(phi). The identity-frame metric PCM_rel = -0.5*cos(phi-phi0) shows the real dynamics: an oscillating wave between 0/12 and 12/12 NC. Time-averaged over 50 steps: all nodes are NC. Chain health at depth 4: all nodes NC in the lineage.
_meta.root_cause: PCM_lab(phi) = -0.5*cos(phi). Half nodes near phi=pi have PCM_lab>0.
_meta.fix: PCM_rel per node + time averaging + ILP depth 4
